empty.title: No skills yet
empty.body: Import a skill from a file, a URL, or the community catalog.

selectPrompt.title: Select a skill
selectPrompt.body: Pick a skill on the left to preview its body.

drawer.title: Add a skill
drawer.subtitle: Import from a file, a URL, or search vetted community skills

file.nameHint: Optional — derived from the first heading if blank.
file.bodyHint: Pasted content is wrapped as untrusted data — never executed as instructions.

url.label: Skill URL
url.hint: Fetched server-side, stored as untrusted, and left disabled until vetted.
url.success: Imported "{name}". Disabled until you vet + enable it.

preview.untrustedNotice: This skill came from an untrusted source. Its body is stored as data (delimiter-wrapped) and must be vetted before it is enabled for an agent.
preview.bodyHint: Saving a changed body creates a new immutable version.

list.title: Skills
list.subtitle: Reusable text + config blocks. Bind one to an agent and it's appended to that agent's prompt.
list.emptyBody: A skill is a reusable instruction set you can attach to one or more agents. Create one or import a .md / .zip.

create.title: Create skill
create.subtitle: A skill is appended to every agent it is bound to — write the description as the directive interface agents will read.

fields.name: Name
fields.descriptionHint: This is the skill's interface — formulate it directively ("Refuse any diff that…"), not as prose.
fields.descriptionPlaceholder: Refuse to approve a diff that introduces a hardcoded secret.
fields.bodyPlaceholder:
# Rule
Describe the rule the agent should follow.

editor.loadErrorBody: The skill could not be loaded.
editor.title: Skill
editor.deleteConfirm: Delete skill "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
editor.bodyHint: Saving a changed body creates a new immutable version.
editor.evalsToast: The eval runner ships in the next lesson — this button is wired but inert for now.

preview2.title: Preview
preview2.subtitle: Rendered as the reviewing agent receives it.

stats.agentsUsingEmpty: No agents have bound this skill yet.
stats.findingsByCategoryEmpty: No findings in the last 30 days.

versions.title: Version history
versions.subtitle: Every save snapshots the body so eval runs stay reproducible against the exact text they scored.
versions.restoreConfirm: Restore version v{version}? A new version will be created with this body.
versions.restoreToast: Restored v{version} — current is now v{current}
versions.diffEmpty: (no changes between this version and current)

evals.title: Evals
evals.subtitle: Run this skill against eval cases to track precision + recall over time.
evals.comingSoon: The eval runner ships in the next lesson.

communityDrawer.title: Search community skills
communityDrawer.subtitle: Import vetted skills from public repos.

import.title: Import skill
import.subtitle: Upload a .md file or a .zip archive containing SKILL.md and reference docs.
import.trustBanner: Imported skills become part of the agent's prompt — they are someone else's instructions running inside your reviewer. Vet the body before you save.

agentTab.title: Skills
agentTab.orderHint: Order matters — earlier skills appear earlier in the assembled prompt. Drag to reorder.
agentTab.empty: No skills bound yet. Add one from the workspace catalog.
agentTab.noUnbound: All workspace skills are already bound.
